shopper.summary: Oily, acne-prone · warm-olive ~NC42 · wedding in a month

criteria.label: Stays matte all day
criteria.evidence: I did not put on a primer or a setting spray and I also did not powder whilst I was out. So this is five hours of nothing... my makeup has not budged at all.

criteria.label: Lasts a 10-hour day
criteria.evidence: The foundation itself stood its ground. It still looks pretty good for 11 hours of wear.

criteria.label: Covers acne & redness
criteria.evidence: It doesn't feel like I'm wearing a lot of makeup, yet I have full coverage over all my old pigment. A couple zits I have.

proof.quote: For reference, I have acne-prone and I have oily skin.
proof.verdict: Sasha was extremely impressed: the foundation blended easily, built to strong coverage with little product, felt lightweight, and still look
Emma Rose was very impressed with Fenty Pro Filt'r Soft Matte on her very oily skin after a five-hour wear test without primer, setting spra
First-impressions application was favorable: she liked the feel and application, and the coverage was pretty good over acne hyperpigmentatio

proof.quote: “As for me, I have combo to oily skin.”
proof.verdict: The reviewer liked Fenty Pro Filt’r Soft Matte overall for her combo-to-oily skin: it lasted nearly 12 hours with limited movement and looke

pick.title: Pro Filt'r Soft Matte Longwear Foundation
pick.why: Every oily, acne-prone reviewer in the corpus rated it a keeper, with no breakout or oxidation complaints.

head_to_head.claim: “24-hour wear, oil control, won’t clog pores” — per MAC

reality.label: Stays matte all day
reality.evidence: I would probably say that this foundation is more like a semi-matte finish. It's not completely matte... because I've got oily combination skin, I did get a lit

reality.label: Lasts a 10-hour day
reality.evidence: In terms of longevity, this product actually lasted me about 8 hours... The foundation lasted a long time.

head_to_head.note: The usual top pick. Real wear tests from oily skin rate its oil control and all-day wear only modest, the exact thing you said fails by 2pm. That rec trusts MAC’s label; we checked it.

alternative.note: Best oil control and wear of all 12, and $16 — but one acne-prone reviewer broke out, so patch-test first.

ranking.product: Make Up For Ever HD Skin
